emails.subject: For your amusement
emails.body: For your amusement To: Duenner, Anthony; Cohagan, Fred; Clark, Craig; Heng, Choon-Boon; Roumel, Jonathan; Todd, Chuck; Sarma, P D; Babu, Sobhan; Leahy, Patrick; Dragon, Appolina; Nunas, Maurice; Hicks, Michelle; Hagerty, Lauren; Masani, Zal; Fernandes, Beaven; Callaway, Jan

emails.subject: RE: For your amusement
emails.body: I like that he watched Sponge Bob Square Pants.... To: Hicks, Michelle

emails.subject: RE: For your amusement
emails.body: Me, too. My little boy watches it all the time. Maybe we can watch it together! To: Mann, Kay

emails.subject: RE: For your amusement
emails.body: Doesn't sound too bad. To: Hicks, Michelle
